zh.title: 诸神黄昏预言全集 - 北欧神话末日预言与世界重生 | Ragnarok Prophecies
zh.description: 北欧神话中的末日预言「诸神黄昏」(Ragnarok) 完整收录，源自《诗体埃达》与《散文埃达》。涵盖芬布尔之冬、诸神之战、世界毁灭与重生等预言叙事，共17条预言条目。
zh.keywords: 诸神黄昏,Ragnarok,北欧神话,末日预言,Edda,埃达,沃尔娃预言,Voluspa,奥丁,托尔,洛基,芬布尔之冬,世界树,尤弥尔

zh.ogDescription: 北欧神话末日预言「诸神黄昏」完整收录与叙事分析。源自《诗体埃达》与《散文埃达》，涵盖世界毁灭与重生的完整预言体系。

en.title: Ragnarok Prophecies - Norse Mythology's End of Days & World Renewal | Full Archive
en.description: Complete collection of Ragnarok prophecies from Norse mythology, sourced from the Poetic Edda and Prose Edda. Covering Fimbulwinter, the great battle, deaths of gods, world destruction, and renewal — 17 prophetic entries.
en.ogTitle: Ragnarok Prophecies - Norse End of Days Complete Archive
en.ogDescription: Complete Ragnarok prophecies from Norse mythology. Sourced from the Poetic Edda and Prose Edda, covering the full prophetic narrative of world destruction and renewal.
en.twitterDescription: Norse mythology's Ragnarok prophecies in full — Fimbulwinter, fall of the gods, world destruction, and rebirth. 17 entries from the Eddas.
